signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation Rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation Rises to 2.2% YoY | NO | HIGH confidence**

South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in January and February, below market forecasts of 2.4% and aligning with the Bank of Korea's 2% target amid Middle East energy volatility.[2][3] Monthly CPI rose 0.34%.[3] No announcements, resolutions, or confirmations today (April 18, 2026) q
